```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement infrastructure monitoring and alerting"
---
# Infrastructure Monitoring
## Task
Set up infrastructure monitoring and alerting.
## Requirements
1. Monitor CPU, memory, disk, network per host. 2. Monitor container resource usage.
3. Set up alerting thresholds (> 80% CPU, > 90% disk). 4. Create runbooks for each alert.
5. Implement escalation policies.
## Constraints
- Alert on actionable issues only. Include runbook link in alert. Page for P1/P2 only.
## Success Criteria
- All infrastructure monitored. Alerts actionable. Runbooks available. Escalation defined.
```
